examples: On scented paths in a small garden I loiter alone.
Some of them can loiter in the air for long periods.
He rounds a corner into an alley where several people loiter outside a club.
Researchers disinclined or unable to loiter in polling stations are increasingly drawn to statistical means of detecting fraud.
The American Global Hawk, for instance, can loiter over a battlefield for a day at a height of more than 60, 000 feet.
